title: GitHub Actions Workflow Run
description: Represents a single execution of a GitHub Actions workflow.

id.description: The unique identifier of the workflow run.

name.description: The name of the workflow run.

node_id.description: The GraphQL node ID of the workflow run.

head_branch.description: The branch associated with the workflow run's head commit.

head_sha.description: The SHA of the head commit that points to the version of the workflow being run.

path.description: The path of the workflow file.

display_title.description: The title of the workflow run as displayed in the GitHub UI.

run_number.description: The auto-incrementing run number for the workflow run.

run_attempt.description: Attempt number of the run. 1 for the first attempt and higher if the workflow was re-run.

event.description: The event that triggered the workflow run.

status.description: The current status of the workflow run.

conclusion.description: The result of the completed workflow run.

workflow_id.description: The ID of the parent workflow.

url.description: The API URL of the workflow run.

html_url.description: The HTML URL of the workflow run on GitHub.

created_at.description: The date and time the workflow run was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the workflow run was last updated.

run_started_at.description: The date and time the workflow run started executing.

jobs_url.description: The API URL for the jobs in this workflow run.

logs_url.description: The API URL for the logs of this workflow run.

artifacts_url.description: The API URL for the artifacts of this workflow run.

cancel_url.description: The API URL to cancel this workflow run.

rerun_url.description: The API URL to re-run this workflow run.

workflow_url.description: The API URL of the parent workflow.

actor.description: The user who triggered the workflow run.

triggering_actor.description: The user who triggered the workflow run (may differ from actor for re-runs).

head_commit.description: The head commit for the workflow run.
